Class ButtonComponent

java.lang.Object
ui.gui.components.ButtonComponent
public class ButtonComponent extends Object
This class provides methods to create various types of buttons with different styles and functionalities. It includes methods for creating icon buttons, action buttons, styled buttons, and management buttons.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Loris

  • Constructor Details

    • ButtonComponent

      public ButtonComponent()

  • Method Details

    • createIconButton

      public static JButton createIconButton(String iconText, String tooltip)
      Creates a button with an icon and a tooltip.
      Parameters:
      iconText - the text to display on the button
      tooltip - the tooltip text for the button
      Returns:
      a JButton with the specified icon and tooltip

    • createActionButton

      public static JButton createActionButton(String text, String tooltip, ActionListener actionListener)
      Creates a button with an icon, a tooltip, and an action listener.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display on the button
      tooltip - the tooltip text for the button
      actionListener - the action listener to be added to the button
      Returns:
      a JButton with the specified icon, tooltip, and action listener

    • createStyledButton

      public static JButton createStyledButton(String text, String tooltip, Dimension preferredSize, Font font, Color background, Color foreground, boolean opaque, Border border, Cursor cursor, ActionListener actionListener)
      Creates a styled button with various customizable properties.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display on the button
      tooltip - the tooltip text for the button
      preferredSize - the preferred size of the button
      font - the font of the button text
      background - the background color of the button
      foreground - the foreground color of the button text
      opaque - whether the button should be opaque
      border - the border of the button
      cursor - the cursor to use when hovering over the button
      actionListener - an ActionListener to be added to the button
      Returns:
      a JButton with the specified properties

    • createManagementButton

      public static JButton createManagementButton(String text, String tooltip, ActionListener actionListener)
      Creates a management button with specific styling and an action listener.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display on the button
      tooltip - the tooltip text for the button
      actionListener - the action listener to be added to the button
      Returns:
      a JButton styled for management purposes
